description: MCP server exposing Power of Now intelligence as MCP tools (wiki search, advisor queue, autoresearcher, beliefs, articles, memory). Each tool carries Toulmin + L2 4-tag metadata.

exposed_tools.name: wiki-search
exposed_tools.description: BM25 search across system/tenant/user wiki tiers

exposed_tools.name: wiki-page
exposed_tools.description: Read raw markdown of a wiki page

exposed_tools.name: intelligence-competitors
exposed_tools.description: Competitor labels + shared ESG risks for a tenant

exposed_tools.name: intelligence-forecast
exposed_tools.description: Sentiment trajectory forecast for a tenant

exposed_tools.name: advisor-resolve
exposed_tools.description: Approve or reject an advisor event

exposed_tools.name: autoresearcher-leaderboard
exposed_tools.description: Top-N kept experiments by metric delta

exposed_tools.name: agent-beliefs-get
exposed_tools.description: Read CompanyAgent beliefs for a tenant

exposed_tools.name: article-list
exposed_tools.description: List recent HOME/HIGH articles for a tenant

exposed_tools.name: memory-recall
exposed_tools.description: Retrieve top-N relevant memories for the user
